_comment: Example web-tech signature corpus for `pontus-cli http --web-corpus` and `scan --inspect --web-corpus`. These rules are LAYERED OVER the built-in clean-room defaults. Categories: server, language, framework, cms, js-library, cdn, analytics. Keep entries clean-room — derive them from public product behaviour, not from Wappalyzer's dataset (C-001). `headers[].needle` is a case-insensitive substring of the header value (empty = presence alone); `cookies[].needle` matches a Set-Cookie name; `body[].needle` is a lowercase substring of the page; `scripts[].needle` is a script-src token whose trailing version is extracted.
